tasks.title: Restore Mission Control public link for tomorrow's investor meeting
tasks.notes: Primary blocker: public ngrok access must load the real app reliably. Confirm localhost:3000, tunnel health, login flow, and fallback access path.

tasks.title: Stabilize Mission Control local runtime on port 3000
tasks.notes: Keep the Next.js app continuously serving on localhost:3000 and document the clean restart path so tomorrow's demo does not depend on session luck.

tasks.title: Clean Task Board for executive review
tasks.notes: Replace stale sprint residue with the real company priorities for this week: investor demo readiness, runtime stability, data reliability, CRM ops, and departmental ownership.

tasks.title: Tighten the Now screen into an executive dashboard
tasks.notes: Now must instantly show current priorities, recent wins, live runtime status, and blockers so it can open the investor meeting cleanly.

tasks.title: Tighten Office runtime view for live operating visibility
tasks.notes: Show each permanent lane with clear status, owned function, current task, and blocker: main, business-manager, data-agent, ghl-agent, and marketing if useful.

tasks.title: Tighten Team view to show the AI department architecture
tasks.notes: Team should support the story that Fast Track Homes is building department-level AI ownership, not just disconnected automations.

tasks.title: Build a demo-safe Mission Control navigation path
tasks.notes: Tomorrow's reliable flow: Now → Team → Office → Task Board → Agent Inbox. Avoid dead or weak surfaces in the live presentation path.

tasks.title: Prepare fallback access plan if public tunnel fails
tasks.notes: Have backup access instructions ready: restart path, localhost route, tunnel reissue steps, and alternate demo route if the public link degrades.

tasks.title: Mission Control investor-demo sprint complete
tasks.notes: Definition of done before tomorrow 10 AM: public link working, localhost working, Now cleaned, Task Board truthful, Office/Team presentable, and demo path tested.
